correct_answer: The patient's DMD carrier status is uncertain because of random X inactivation
reasoning:
DMD Genetics: DMD is an X-linked recessive disorder caused by mutations in the dystrophin gene on the X chromosome. Females are carriers if they inherit a dysfunctional dystrophin gene from one parent and a normal gene from the other. Males with a dystrophin mutation exhibit the full disease phenotype.

I just felt like this implied E was possibly correct so I changed my answer

highlights.text: DMD is an X-linked recessive disorder caused by mutations in the dystrophin gene on the X chromosome. Females are carriers if they inherit a dysfunctional dystrophin gene from one parent and a normal gene from the other. Males with a dystrophin mutation exhibit the full disease phenotype.
